files.patch:
@@ -4,1 +4,1 @@
-version=26
+version=28

@@ -4,1 +4,1 @@
-[online documentation](https://openjdk.org/groups/build/doc/building.html),

-        <maven.compiler.target>26</maven.compiler.target>
+        <maven.compiler.source>28</maven.compiler.source>
+        <maven.compiler.target>28</maven.compiler.target>

@@ -11,1 +11,1 @@
-    <!-- Requires JDK 26 build to work -->
+    <!-- Requires JDK 28 build to work -->
@@ -13,2 +13,2 @@

-        <maven.compiler.target>26</maven.compiler.target>
+        <maven.compiler.source>28</maven.compiler.source>
+        <maven.compiler.target>28</maven.compiler.target>
@@ -74,2 +74,0 @@

-                        <target>26</target>
@@ -95,1 +93,1 @@
-</project>
+</project>

@@ -37,2 +37,2 @@

-        <maven.compiler.target>26</maven.compiler.target>
+        <maven.compiler.source>28</maven.compiler.source>
+        <maven.compiler.target>28</maven.compiler.target>

@@ -37,2 +37,2 @@

-        <maven.compiler.target>26</maven.compiler.target>
+        <maven.compiler.source>28</maven.compiler.source>
+        <maven.compiler.target>28</maven.compiler.target>

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java bld
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java bld

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java clean
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java clean

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@

+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java dot

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@

+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java exp

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java help
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java help

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java run 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java run

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java sanity 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java sanity

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java test 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java test

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java test-suite
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java test-suite

@@ -24,1 +24,1 @@
-- A base JDK >= 25. We currently use OpenJDK 26 for development.
+- A base JDK >= 26. We currently use OpenJDK 26 for development.

@@ -37,1 +37,1 @@
-The following build process assumes you have `BOOT_JDK` set to an existing JDK ([JDK 25+](https://jdk.java.net/25/)).
+The following build process assumes you have `BOOT_JDK` set to an existing JDK ([JDK 26+](https://jdk.java.net/26/)).
@@ -41,1 +41,1 @@
-export BOOT_JDK=${HOME}/java/jdk-25.0.1.jdk/Contents/Home/
+export BOOT_JDK=${HOME}/java/jdk-26.jdk/Contents/Home/

@@ -160,1 +160,1 @@
-java --add-modules jdk.incubator.code --enable-preview --source 26 hat/bld.java
+java --add-modules jdk.incubator.code --enable-preview --source 28 hat/bld.java
@@ -165,1 +165,1 @@
-We also have a handy `hat/XXXX` which allows us to avoid specifying common args `--enable-preview --source 26` eash time we launch a script
+We also have a handy `hat/XXXX` which allows us to avoid specifying common args `--enable-preview --source 28` eash time we launch a script
@@ -171,1 +171,1 @@
-|   ├── sanity      (the args for sanity.java)  "--enable-preview --source 26 sanity"
+|   ├── sanity      (the args for sanity.java)  "--enable-preview --source 28 sanity"
@@ -173,1 +173,1 @@
-|   ├── run         (the args for sanity.java)  "--enable-preview --source 26 hatrun"
+|   ├── run         (the args for sanity.java)  "--enable-preview --source 28 hatrun"
@@ -175,1 +175,1 @@
-|   ├── bld         (the args for bld.java)      "--enable-preview --source 26 bld"
+|   ├── bld         (the args for bld.java)      "--enable-preview --source 28 bld"
@@ -187,1 +187,1 @@
-java --add-modules jdk.incubator.code --enable-preview --source 26 hat/bld.java
+java --add-modules jdk.incubator.code --enable-preview --source 28 hat/bld.java

@@ -100,1 +100,1 @@
-                        .debug().enablePreview().source(26).addModules("jdk.incubator.code")
+                        .debug().enablePreview().source(28).addModules("jdk.incubator.code")

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java bld
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java bld

@@ -34,1 +34,1 @@
-                │    ├──bld                             //  --enable-preview --source 26 hat/bld.java
+                │    ├──bld                             //  --enable-preview --source 28 hat/bld.java
@@ -36,1 +36,1 @@
-                │    ├──run                             //  --enable-preview --source 26 hat/run.java
+                │    ├──run                             //  --enable-preview --source 28 hat/run.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java clean
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java clean

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java dot
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java dot

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java exp
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java exp

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java help
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java help

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
---enable-preview --source 26 hat/bld.java
+--enable-preview --source 28 hat/bld.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
---enable-preview --source 26 hat/clean.java
+--enable-preview --source 28 hat/clean.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
---enable-preview --source 26 hat/run.java
+--enable-preview --source 28 hat/run.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
---enable-preview --source 26 hat/sanity.java
+--enable-preview --source 28 hat/sanity.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
---enable-preview --source 26 hat/test.java
+--enable-preview --source 28 hat/test.java

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java run 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java run

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java sanity 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java sanity

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java test 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java test

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
--cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 26 hat.java test-suite 
+-cp hat/job.jar --enable-preview --source 28 hat.java test-suite

@@ -60,2 +60,2 @@
-          <source>26</source>
-          <target>26</target>
+          <source>28</source>
+          <target>28</target>

@@ -26,3 +26,2 @@
-DISABLED_WARNINGS_java += dangling-doc-comments
-
-# DOCLINT += -Xdoclint:all/protected
+DOCLINT += -Xdoclint:all/protected \
+    '-Xdoclint/package:-jdk.incubator.code.internal,-jdk.incubator.code.bytecode.impl,-jdk.incubator.code.dialect.java.impl,-jdk.incubator.code.extern.impl'

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2012, 2024, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2012, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -408,2 +408,0 @@
-                        cob.aload(0)
-                           .invokespecial(CD_Object, INIT_NAME, MTD_void);
@@ -416,1 +414,3 @@
-                        cob.return_();
+                        cob.aload(0)
+                           .invokespecial(CD_Object, INIT_NAME, MTD_void)
+                           .return_();

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2014, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2014, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -63,0 +63,1 @@
+ * @uses java.time.format.DateTimeFormatterPatternProvider
@@ -138,1 +139,0 @@
-
@@ -150,3 +150,3 @@
-    // Note: all modules in the exported list participate in preview  features
-    // and therefore if they use preview features they do not need to be
-    // compiled with "--enable-preview".
+    // Note: all modules in the exported list participate in preview features,
+    // normal or reflective.  They do not need to be compiled with "--enable-preview"
+    // to use preview features and do not need to suppress "preview" warnings.
@@ -154,1 +154,1 @@
-    // module declaration be annotated with jdk.internal.javac.ParticipatesInPreview
+    // module declaration be annotated with jdk.internal.javac.ParticipatesInPreview.
@@ -219,3 +219,1 @@
-        jdk.unsupported,
-        jdk.internal.vm.ci,
-        jdk.graal.compiler;
+        jdk.unsupported;
@@ -246,1 +244,0 @@
-        jdk.internal.vm.ci,
@@ -253,1 +250,0 @@
-        jdk.internal.vm.ci,
@@ -257,1 +253,0 @@
-        jdk.internal.vm.ci,
@@ -277,1 +272,0 @@
-        jdk.internal.vm.ci,
@@ -281,1 +275,2 @@
-        jdk.net;
+        jdk.net,
+        jdk.security.auth;
@@ -388,0 +383,1 @@
+    uses java.time.format.DateTimeFormatterPatternProvider;
@@ -403,1 +399,0 @@
-    uses sun.text.spi.JavaTimeDateTimePatternProvider;

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2002, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2002, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -161,0 +161,10 @@
+
+    /**
+      * 27, tbd
+      */
+    JDK27("27"),
+
+    /**
+      * 28, tbd
+      */
+    JDK28("28"),
@@ -213,0 +223,2 @@
+        case JDK28  -> Target.JDK1_28;
+        case JDK27  -> Target.JDK1_27;
@@ -269,0 +281,1 @@
+        TYPE_ANNOTATIONS_ON_VAR_LAMBDA_PARAMETER(MIN, JDK19),
@@ -370,0 +383,2 @@
+        case JDK27  -> RELEASE_27;
+        case JDK28  -> RELEASE_28;

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2005, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2005, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -1108,1 +1108,1 @@
-              .anyMatch(d -> (d.getKind() == Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING && werror) ||
+              .anyMatch(d -> (d.getKind() == Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING && werror && ACCEPT_NON_RECOVERABLE_LINTS.test(d)) ||
@@ -1199,2 +1199,3 @@
-            deferredDiagnosticHandler.reportDeferredDiagnostics(showAll ? ACCEPT_ALL
-                                                                        : ACCEPT_NON_RECOVERABLE);
+            deferredDiagnosticHandler.reportDeferredDiagnostics(
+                    ACCEPT_NON_RECOVERABLE_LINTS.and(showAll ? ACCEPT_ALL
+                                                             : ACCEPT_NON_RECOVERABLE));
@@ -1205,0 +1206,7 @@
+            private final Predicate<JCDiagnostic> ACCEPT_NON_RECOVERABLE_LINTS =
+                    d -> !Optional.of(d)
+                            .filter(diag -> !diag.isFlagSet(SYNTAX))
+                            .map(JCDiagnostic::getLintCategory)
+                            .map(lc -> lc.annotationSuppression ||
+                                       lc == Lint.LintCategory.INCUBATING)
+                            .orElse(false);

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
-# Copyright (c) 1999, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+# Copyright (c) 1999, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -999,0 +999,1 @@
+# 0: list of type or message segment, 1: list of type or message segment
@@ -1000,1 +1001,7 @@
-    incompatible parameter types in lambda expression
+    incompatible parameter types in lambda expression\n\
+    required: {0}\n\
+    found:    {1}
+
+# 0: symbol
+compiler.misc.wrong.number.args.in.lambda=\
+    wrong number of parameters in lambda expression for functional interface {0}
@@ -1479,0 +1486,20 @@
+compiler.err.not.exhaustive.details=\
+    the switch expression does not cover all possible input values\n\
+    missing patterns:
+
+compiler.err.not.exhaustive.statement.details=\
+    the switch statement does not cover all possible input values\n\
+    missing patterns:
+
+# 0: type
+compiler.misc.binding.pattern=\
+    {0} _
+
+# 0: type, 1: list of diagnostic
+compiler.misc.record.pattern=\
+    {0}({1})
+
+# 0: type, 1: name
+compiler.misc.enum.constant.pattern=\
+    {0}.{1}
+
@@ -1704,0 +1731,12 @@
+# 0: string, 1: string, 2: string, 3: number, 4: string, 5: string, 6: string, 7: string
+compiler.note.lambda.deserialization.stat=\
+    Generating lambda deserialization\n\
+    functionalInterfaceClass: {0}\n\
+    functionalInterfaceMethodName: {1}\n\
+    functionalInterfaceMethodSignature:{2}\n\
+    implMethodKind: {3}\n\
+    implClass: {4}\n\
+    implMethodName: {5}\n\
+    implMethodSignature: {6}\n\
+    instantiatedMethodType: {7}
+
@@ -1931,1 +1970,1 @@
-# flags: aggregate, mandatory, default-enabled
+# flags: aggregate, mandatory, default-enabled, deprecation-sensitive
@@ -2492,0 +2531,1 @@
+# lint: classfile
@@ -2496,0 +2536,1 @@
+# lint: classfile

@@ -36,1 +36,1 @@
-import static jdk.incubator.code.dialect.java.JavaOp.JavaExpression.ConstantExpressionEvaluator;
+import static jdk.incubator.code.dialect.java.JavaOp.ConstantExpressionEvaluator;
@@ -39,1 +39,2 @@
- * A transformer that replace every operation that model a constant expression with its value.
+ * A transformer that replaces every operation that models a constant expression with a constant operation
+ * whose value is the result of evaluating that constant expression.
@@ -60,0 +61,8 @@
+    /**
+     * Transforms an operation, replacing an operation that models a constant expression with a constant operation
+     * whose value is the result of evaluating that constant expression.
+     *
+     * @param l  the lookup to use for reflective access
+     * @param op the operation to transform
+     * @return the transformed operation
+     */

@@ -140,1 +140,1 @@
-    /** {@link JavaType} representing {@link Object[]} */
+    /** {@link JavaType} representing {@code Object[]} */

@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@

+#  Copyright (c) 2013, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -112,2 +112,1 @@

-   :jdk_foreign_stress
+   -:tier3
@@ -394,5 +393,1 @@

-    -java/foreign/TestUpcallStress.java
-
-jdk_foreign_stress = \
-    java/foreign/TestUpcallStress.java
+    -java/foreign/TestMatrix.java
@@ -561,0 +556,1 @@

@@ -667,1 +663,2 @@

+    sun/security/krb5/config/native/TestDynamicStore.java \
+    sun/security/tools/keytool/EchoPassword.java
